response:
## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Mega-Menu Navigation With Hover-Only Submenus **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Keyboard Motor (HIGH), Screen Reader Semantic (MEDIUM), Cognitive Neurodivergent (MEDIUM) **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Motion, Auditory, Reflow --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 2 | | MAJOR | 4 | | MINOR | 1 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None of the escalated perspectives passed all checklist items. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role #### **Front-End Dev** - **Submenu only accessible via hover, no keyboard triggers** — Keyboard Motor — CRITICAL — 2.1.1 Keyboard Accessible - **No ARIA roles for submenu structure** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value - **No prefers-reduced-motion handling for submenu animation** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold - **Submenu disappears immediately on mouseleave** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 1.4.13 Content on Hover or Focus #### **UX Design** - **Submenu disappears immediately on mouseleave** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 1.4.13 Content on Hover or Focus - **No keyboard focus management for submenu** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.4.3 Focus Order #### **Visual Design** - **Submenu animation lacks prefers-reduced-motion handling** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification None in this audit (all findings are code-level). --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ### CRITICAL: Submenu only accessible via hover, no keyboard triggers **WCAG:** 2.1.1 Keyboard Accessible **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** `onMouseEnter`/`onMouseLeave` only in `
  • ` element, no keyboard event handlers **Fix:** Add `onFocus`/`onBlur` handlers to parent link, use `aria-haspopup`, and implement keyboard navigation (Arrow/Enter) ### CRITICAL: No ARIA roles for submenu structure **WCAG:** 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** Submenu is `
    ` with no `role="menu"`, items are `` with no `role="menuitem"` **Fix:** Add `role="menu"` to submenu container, `role="menuitem"` to links, `aria-haspopup="true"` to parent links ### MAJOR: No prefers-reduced-motion handling for submenu animation **WCAG:** 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `@keyframes slideDown` used without `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` **Fix:** Add media query to disable animation when reduced motion is preferred ### MAJOR: Submenu disappears immediately on mouseleave **WCAG:** 1.4.13 Content on Hover or Focus **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `onMouseLeave={() => setOpenMenu(null)}` with no delay or focus-based persistence **Fix:** Add 1-2 second delay before hiding, keep open when submenu has focus ### MAJOR: No keyboard focus management for submenu **WCAG:** 2.4.3 Focus Order **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** Submenu appears on hover but not on keyboard focus, no focus trap management **Fix:** Implement focus containment within submenu when open, return focus to parent on close ### MINOR: Submenu link focus indicator has negative outline-offset **WCAG:** 2.4.7 Focus Visible **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `.submenu-link:focus-visible { outline-offset: -2px }` may cause clipping **Fix:** Use positive offset or adjust padding to ensure full visibility --- ## Code-Level Evidence ### Missing Keyboard Triggers ```jsx
  • setOpenMenu(item.id)} // ❌ Only mouse onMouseLeave={() => setOpenMenu(null)} // ❌ No keyboard > ``` ### Missing ARIA Roles ```jsx {item.children.length > 0 && openMenu === item.id && (
    // ❌ No role="menu" {item.children.map(child => ( // ❌ No role="menuitem" {child.label} ))}
    )} ``` ### Missing Motion Handling ```css @keyframes slideDown { ... } // ❌ No @media (prefers-reduced-motion) ``` --- ## A11y Evidence Findings (Contract Format) ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: keyboard-missing-triggers fingerprint: 3a7d4e1c source: perspective-audit Keyboard Motor checklist wcag_or_apg: 2.1.1 Keyboard Accessible section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(a) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM evidence: ./mega-menu.jsx:22-24 reproduction_steps: Tab to "Products" link, press Enter/Arrow keys expected_behavior: Submenu appears and is navigable via keyboard actual_behavior: Submenu only appears on hover trend: new ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: aria-missing-roles fingerprint: 8b2e1f9d source: perspective-audit Screen Reader Semantic checklist wcag_or_apg: 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(j) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM evidence: ./mega-menu.jsx:32-37 reproduction_steps: Use screen reader to navigate main nav expected_behavior: Submenu announced as menu with menuitems actual_behavior: Submenu announced as generic list trend: new --- ## Implementation Recommendations 1. **Keyboard Support** - Add `onFocus`/`onBlur` to parent links to trigger submenu - Implement keyboard navigation (Arrow keys to move between submenu items) - Add `aria-haspopup="true"` and `aria-expanded` to parent links 2. **ARIA Roles** - Add `role="menu"` to submenu container - Add `role="menuitem"` to submenu links - Add `aria-labelledby` to associate submenu with parent link 3. **Motion Handling** - Wrap animation in `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` to disable - Provide visual alternative (fade-in) for reduced-motion users 4. **Focus Management** - Add 1-second delay before hiding submenu on mouseleave - Ensure focus remains within submenu when open --- ## Severity Rationale - **CRITICAL** issues block keyboard access to core navigation (submenu) and violate fundamental keyboard operability (2.1.1). - **MAJOR** issues include missing ARIA roles (4.1.2) and poor motion handling (2.3.1), which significantly degrade accessibility for screen reader and vestibular users. - **MINOR** issues like focus styling are fixable but don't prevent basic functionality.
